justification.what: ElevenLabs Creator-tier subscription — first-month charge ($11.00) of $22/mo recurring TTS service. Retroactive log entry; Azure-KV API key (elevenlabs-api-key) provisioned by operator prior to this log.
justification.where: ElevenLabs cloud SaaS (api.elevenlabs.io) — consumed by operator-fleet-ops/pillars/media TTS handler at runtime, locally cached SHA-256 audio in pillar volume.
justification.why: Natural-voice narration is required for: (1) operator-fleet-ops cockpit walkthroughs (visual onboarding for fleet-ops dashboard); (2) Boofire social-media reel TTS; (3) future Boofire commercial outreach voice-overs. Creator-tier voice quality + monthly character allowance justify $22/mo OpEx vs free/lower-tier alternatives that lack production-grade voices.
justification.who: ngothientuong (Boofire / AnAn's Store LLC) — sole operator. Project=operator-fleet-ops. Vendor billing email = tuong@boofire.ai.
justification.how_helps: Eliminates manual voice-over recording bottleneck. Enables async generation of narration for cockpit walkthroughs (per-pillar) + social-reel batch + future outbound commercial TTS. Compounds: each generated voice is cached SHA-256 keyed, so repeat content costs $0 in characters.
justification.expected_return: Direct: cockpit dashboard onboarding walkthroughs (operator + future-customer demo). Indirect: Boofire content-funnel reels feeding D3 funneling pillar (organic→qualified prospect conversion); future commercial outreach TTS supporting outbound sales for client SKUs. ROI break-even at ~5 minutes of voice-over generated/month vs equivalent vendor (Resemble/PlayHT/etc).
